testcase.name: copywriting.freeGenerate — happy path > calls CopywritingAgent(mode=free), writes history with full fields, returns row
copywriting.freeGenerate — zod validation > empty topic → TRPCError BAD_REQUEST
copywriting.freeGenerate — fallback path > agent returns isFallback=true → history written with isFallback=true
copywriting.freeGenerate — agentMode field > agentMode="free" is always written to history regardless of result
US-003 AC-4: copywriting.freeGenerate integration — nock SDK + real DB > freeGenerate: calls mock stream, writes history + cost_log to real DB with correct fields
